To: Project distribution list
From: PC
Subject: Thanks all — IAM programme wrap-up

Hi everyone,

As we wrap up the IAM programme, I just wanted to say a big thank you to the whole team for all the hard work over the last eleven months. It's been a great project and I've really enjoyed working with you all. The PC team did a fantastic job on the dashboards and everything else.

Special thanks to everyone on the client side too. Let's all keep in touch and hopefully we'll work together again sometime!

On the bid Victor mentioned — happy to chat about teaming up, sounds interesting. I'll mention it to the director.

Thanks again everyone and all the best!

PC
